item.name: Add points from value to customer

body.raw:
{
    "value": "number (required)",
    "type": "string (required, maxLength: 255, custom value identifying external service, e.g., 'Shop ecommerce purchase')",
    "external_id": "string (optional, maxLength: 255, must be unique, used to identify specific points registration of external service)",
    "order_id": "string (optional, maxLength: 255, if not set, external_id will be used)",
    "items": [
      "Item (array of product SKUs or IDs that compose the order)"
    ],
    "metadata": "object (custom metadata)",
    "source": "string (optional, enum: OFFLINE_PURCHASE | ONLINE_PURCHASE | BACKOFFICE | CATALOG_ORDER | POINTS_EXCHANGE | ACTIONS | GAME | REFERRAL | COUPONS | CANCELLATION | REVIEWS)"
  }
